id.description: Asset ID (use either id or type)

type.description: Asset type (use either id or type)

code.description: Asset code (required for classic and fiat assets)

issuer.description: Asset issuer address (required for classic assets)

asset.description: Asset reference - specify either id or type with required fields

wallet_address.description: Receiver wallet address (Stellar account or contract)

receiver.description: Receiver reference - specify exactly one identifier

wallet.description: Wallet reference - specify either id or address
